dialogues.cn: 黑港城的城墙……
dialogues.en: ...the wall Blackhaven

dialogues.cn: 由玄武岩筑成 高不可攀
dialogues.en: are unscalable basalt stone.

dialogues.cn: 城堡四周由一条干涸的深沟环绕
dialogues.en: And the castle is surrounded by a deep, dry moat.

dialogues.cn: 即使未来多恩入侵 城堡也绝对坚不可破
dialogues.en: It is well fortified against any future Dornish incursions.

dialogues.cn: 虽然我的宝座略小
dialogues.en: And though my seat may be lesser in size,

dialogues.cn: 但城堡位置优越
dialogues.en: it is situated most pleasingly.

dialogues.cn: 我和父亲曾有幸接待过亚莉珊王后
dialogues.en: The view across the Marches is inspiring,

dialogues.cn: 当时她说 边疆地的景色十分震撼人心
dialogues.en: so said Queen Alysanne herself when she honored my father and I--

dialogues.cn: 告诉我 唐德利恩大人
dialogues.en: And tell me, Lord Dondarrion,

dialogues.cn: 您觉得我的曾祖母有世人说得那么美丽吗？
dialogues.en: did you think my great-grandmother as beautiful as they say?

dialogues.cn: 公主 那已经是半个世纪前的事了
dialogues.en: This was half a century ago, Princess.

dialogues.cn: 是的 的确
dialogues.en: Yes, it was.

dialogues.cn: 这话恐怕不太得体 公主
dialogues.en: That was unseemly, Princess.

dialogues.cn: 这个人比我的父亲还老
dialogues.en: The man is older than my father.

dialogues.cn: 还争着想成为我的夫婿
dialogues.en: It's unseemly for him to put himself forward

dialogues.cn: 这才是真的不得体
dialogues.en: as a contender for my hand.

dialogues.cn: 下一位！
dialogues.en: Next!

dialogues.cn: 又来了个小孩
dialogues.en: And now a child.

dialogues.cn: 布莱伍德是一个古老的家族 有着强大的军事力量
dialogues.en: The Blackwoods are an ancient house with a formidable army.

dialogues.cn: 他们曾在河间地称王统治
dialogues.en: In the Riverlands, they once ruled as kings.

dialogues.cn: 先民之血依旧流淌在他们体内
dialogues.en: The blood of the First Men still flows in their veins.

dialogues.cn: 开始吧
dialogues.en: Go on.

dialogues.cn: 公主殿下……
dialogues.en: My Princess...

dialogues.cn: 自从我祖父的祖父 卢卡斯·布莱伍德
dialogues.en: ours is a bond that has long endured,

dialogues.cn: 在征服战争中为龙王效力以来
dialogues.en: since Lucas Blackwood, the grandsire of my grandsire,

dialogues.cn: 我们两家的深厚情谊传承已久
dialogues.en: aided the Dragon in his war of conquest--

dialogues.cn: 是呀 布莱伍德家族真是在战场上扭转乾坤了呢
dialogues.en: Aye, the Blackwoods truly turned the tide on that one.

dialogues.cn: 我们历史悠久 融合了先民血脉
dialogues.en: Coursed with the blood of the First Men,

dialogues.cn: 深深扎根在这片土地上
dialogues.en: our history is deeply rooted in this land,

dialogues.cn: 正是您的家族令我们能在此安居乐业
dialogues.en: which your house has made its home.

dialogues.cn: 公主 如果我被选为您的夫婿……
dialogues.en: If chosen as your match, Princess...

dialogues.cn: 您的生活将会无比轻松
dialogues.en: your days shall be easy

dialogues.cn: 我也将保护您日夜周全
dialogues.en: and nights safe under my protection.

dialogues.cn: “保护”？公主可是有一条龙的 你这蠢货
dialogues.en: "Protection"? The Princess has a dragon, you dumb cunt.

dialogues.cn: 布雷肯！
dialogues.en: Bracken!

dialogues.cn: 这小子我倒是有点喜欢
dialogues.en: I could learn to like that one.

dialogues.cn: 让我们有请下一位吧
dialogues.en: Let us have the next

dialogues.cn: 赶快结束就能去吃晚饭了
dialogues.en: so we may go to supper.

dialogues.cn: 懦夫
dialogues.en: Craven.

dialogues.cn: 我们走吧
dialogues.en: We're leaving.

dialogues.cn: 把剑收起来 你们这群蠢材！
dialogues.en: Sheathe that steel, you twats!

dialogues.cn: 通知码头 让奥斯温船长把船准备好
dialogues.en: Send word to the harbor and have Captain Oswin ready the ship.

dialogues.cn: 公主 我们应该在三天后再去苦桥的
dialogues.en: Princess, we're due in Bitterbridge in three days' time.

dialogues.cn: 只要能结束这荒唐的选夫大会
dialogues.en: I would happily row myself back to King's Landing

dialogues.cn: 我非常乐意自己划船回君临
dialogues.en: if it brought an end to this ridiculous pageant.

dialogues.cn: 别看 公主
dialogues.en: Don't look, Princess.

dialogues.cn: 公主 我们一小时内就可以登岸了
dialogues.en: We should make landfall inside the hour, Princess.

dialogues.cn: 你觉得他会怎么想？
dialogues.en: How do you think he will take it?

dialogues.cn: 您是说拒绝陛下派来的所有求亲者
dialogues.en: Do you speak of how you rejected every suitor

dialogues.cn: 还是说突然结束这场原本
dialogues.en: His Grace put before you, or how you abruptly ended the tour

dialogues.cn: 还剩两个月的巡游呢？
dialogues.en: with two months remaining?

dialogues.cn: 隐蔽！
dialogues.en: Take cover!

dialogues.cn: 公主！
dialogues.en: Princess!

dialogues.cn: 您还好吗？没事吧？
dialogues.en: You all right? Are you?

dialogues.cn: - 快把学士找来！ - 我没事
dialogues.en: - Fetch the maester! - I'm fine.

dialogues.cn: 是戴蒙
dialogues.en: It's Daemon.

dialogues.cn: 把它加到王座里吧
dialogues.en: Add it to the chair.

dialogues.cn: 你戴了一顶王冠
dialogues.en: You wear a crown.

dialogues.cn: 你自立为王了吗？
dialogues.en: Do you also call yourself "King"?

dialogues.cn: 我们战胜三城同盟会后
dialogues.en: Once we smashed the Triarchy,

dialogues.cn: 他们称我为“狭海之王”
dialogues.en: they named me "King of the Narrow Sea."

dialogues.cn: 但我明白 陛下您才是唯一真正的国王
dialogues.en: But I know that there is only one true king, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 我的王冠以及石阶列岛……都属于您
dialogues.en: My crown and the Stepstones... are yours.

dialogues.cn: 科利斯大人在哪里？
dialogues.en: Where is Lord Corlys?

dialogues.cn: 他驾船回潮头岛了
dialogues.en: He sailed home to Driftmark.

dialogues.cn: - 那是谁在据守石阶列岛呢？ - 潮水……
dialogues.en: - Who holds the Stepstones? - The tides...

dialogues.cn: 螃蟹 以及两千死去的三城同盟会海盗
dialogues.en: the crabs, and 2,000 dead Triarchy corsairs,

dialogues.cn: 我将他们曝尸沙滩 以儆效尤
dialogues.en: staked to the sand to warn those who might follow.

dialogues.cn: 起来吧
dialogues.en: Rise.

dialogues.cn: 王国欠你一笔大大的封赏 弟弟
dialogues.en: The realm owes you a great debt, brother.

dialogues.cn: 来吧
dialogues.en: Come.

dialogues.cn: 这是我们的好机会……
dialogues.en: This is our chance...

dialogues.cn: 戴蒙 他会外出探险 海外游历
dialogues.en: Daemon, he would venture off, abroad,

dialogues.cn: 赢下比武大会……
dialogues.en: winning tournaments...

dialogues.cn: 不不不不
dialogues.en: No, no, no, no, no, no, no, no.

dialogues.cn: 我不会再争论这个话题了
dialogues.en: I will not revisit this debate.

dialogues.cn: 你一直都是母亲的最爱
dialogues.en: You were always mother's favorite.

dialogues.cn: 不 这不是什么了不起的大秘密
dialogues.en: No, it's no great mystery.

dialogues.cn: 你一直是她的最爱
dialogues.en: You were.

dialogues.cn: 我们的母亲 她才不管什么习俗 传统或是规矩
dialogues.en: Our mother, she had no regard for custom or tradition, rules.

dialogues.cn: 可惜啊 我并不是什么武艺高超的勇士
dialogues.en: And I, sadly, was no great warrior.

dialogues.cn: 恭喜您大获全胜
dialogues.en: Congratulations on your victory.

dialogues.cn: 谢谢您 公主
dialogues.en: Thank you, Princess.

dialogues.cn: 或许戴蒙王子想去长廊转转吗？
dialogues.en: Perhaps Prince Daemon would care for a tour of the gallery?

dialogues.cn: 他还没有见过诺佛斯和科霍尔
dialogues.en: He hasn't yet seen the new tapestries

dialogues.cn: 给您送来的新挂毯呢
dialogues.en: gifted to you by Norvos and Qohor.

dialogues.cn: 你想去看看新挂毯吗？
dialogues.en: Would you like to see the tapestries?

dialogues.cn: 他对这些东西才不感兴趣
dialogues.en: He has no interest in such things.

dialogues.cn: 我挺想去看看
dialogues.en: I'd like to see them.

dialogues.cn: 那你不用拦着自己
dialogues.en: Then you should not deprive yourself.

dialogues.cn: 那我自己去欣赏了
dialogues.en: I shall enjoy them alone.

dialogues.cn: 倒酒
dialogues.en: More wine.

dialogues.cn: 我说了 你才是母亲的最爱
dialogues.en: As I said, you were the favorite.

dialogues.cn: 不 你是 你才是 我坚信
dialogues.en: No, you were. You were. I insist.

dialogues.cn: 我猜巡游不怎么顺利
dialogues.en: I surmise the tour did not go well.

dialogues.cn: 我已经尽力忍了很久了
dialogues.en: I endured it for as long as I could.

dialogues.cn: 七国上下每一个年轻的骑士和贵族都来讨好你……
dialogues.en: To have every young knight and lord in the Seven Kingdoms fawning over you...

dialogues.cn: 这可真惨啊
dialogues.en: What misery.

dialogues.cn: 对于全国女孩来说 能在两个提亲者当中选择就很难得了
dialogues.en: It is rare for girls in this realm to get a choice between two suitors,

dialogues.cn: 更不用说有四十个能挑的
dialogues.en: no less two score of them.

dialogues.cn: 那些男人和男孩并不是想讨好我
dialogues.en: Those men and boys don't fawn over me.

dialogues.cn: 他们只是奔着我的名号和瓦雷利亚血统来的
dialogues.en: They only want my name and my Valyrian blood for their offspring.

dialogues.cn: 我倒觉得还挺浪漫的
dialogues.en: I think it's rather romantic.

dialogues.cn: 关在城堡里 被逼着生出子嗣
dialogues.en: How romantic it must be to get imprisoned in a castle

dialogues.cn: 还真挺浪漫
dialogues.en: and made to squeeze out heirs.

dialogues.cn: 对不起
dialogues.en: Sorry.

dialogues.cn: 他有多生气？
dialogues.en: How angry is he?

dialogues.cn: 陛下花了很大心思为你安排这次巡游
dialogues.en: The King went through great effort to arrange your tour.

dialogues.cn: 他很……沮丧
dialogues.en: He is... frustrated.

dialogues.cn: 不过你回家了 我很高兴
dialogues.en: But I am glad you are home.

dialogues.cn: 我发现自己现在已经没什么朋友了
dialogues.en: I find I have few friends lately.

dialogues.cn: 我多希望现在我还是阿莉森小姐 不过……
dialogues.en: I like to believe I'm still the Lady Alicent, but...

dialogues.cn: 在所有人眼里 我都只是“王后陛下”
dialogues.en: all anyone sees when they look at me now is "The Queen."

dialogues.cn: 我也想你了
dialogues.en: I've missed you, too.

dialogues.cn: 所以……
dialogues.en: So...

dialogues.cn: 你想要什么？
dialogues.en: what do you want?

dialogues.cn: 只想回归家庭温暖
dialogues.en: Only the comforts of home.

dialogues.cn: 我以为你在这个家里感受不到什么温暖
dialogues.en: I had not thought you particularly comfortable in this home.

dialogues.cn: 不过我觉得 这次冒险之后你好像变了
dialogues.en: Though I do suppose you seem changed by your adventures.

dialogues.cn: 或许 变得更成熟了
dialogues.en: More mature, perhaps.

dialogues.cn: 你这四年也成熟了许多 公主
dialogues.en: You've matured yourself these last four years, Princess.

dialogues.cn: 你会习惯众人瞩目的
dialogues.en: You'll get used to the attention.

dialogues.cn: 受人关注我可以忍受
dialogues.en: The attention I can endure.

dialogues.cn: 忍不了是别的事
dialogues.en: It's the rest I could do without.

dialogues.cn: 我父亲似乎很想把我卖给拥有最大城堡的领主
dialogues.en: My father seems content to sell me off

dialogues.cn: 不管是谁 只要城堡够大他就满足了
dialogues.en: to whichever lord has the biggest castle.

dialogues.cn: 你不知道可能还有更糟糕的交易呢
dialogues.en: There are worse things to be sold for.

dialogues.cn: 听起来多么孤独啊
dialogues.en: Such a lonely prospect.

dialogues.cn: 赢回石阶列岛本该归还王国所有
dialogues.en: The Stepstones were meant to be won for the realm,

dialogues.cn: 但这么多天过去了 我们似乎只是
dialogues.en: but over the past few days, it seems we have traded

dialogues.cn: 把螃蟹喂食者换成了海蛇
dialogues.en: a crabfeeder for a seasnake.

dialogues.cn: 他明显是在报复您迎娶阿莉森王后 拒绝兰娜尔小姐
dialogues.en: This is clearly a rebuke for passing over Lady Laena for Queen Alicent.

dialogues.cn: 他为女儿求亲那件事 已经过去了好几年
dialogues.en: Years have passed since the business with his daughter.

dialogues.cn: 他不会还在耿耿于怀吧？
dialogues.en: Certainly, he cannot still be wroth?

dialogues.cn: 毫无疑问  “海蛇”过于自负 陛下
dialogues.en: The Sea Snake is an over-proud man, to be sure, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 之前的请求被拒 有损他的自尊心
dialogues.en: That pride has been injured.

dialogues.cn: 或许我们可以设法弥合伤口？
dialogues.en: Perhaps we can salve the wound?

dialogues.cn: 恐怕科利斯大人的自尊是眼下最不需要操心的事
dialogues.en: I fear Lord Corlys's pride is the least of our worries.

dialogues.cn: 无意给您带来更多困扰 陛下
dialogues.en: I don't wish to cause you further distress,

dialogues.cn: 但我哥哥从旧镇送来一条令人不安的消息
dialogues.en: Your Grace, but my brother has sent disturbing word from Oldtown.

dialogues.cn: 据称 科利斯伯爵正在密谋
dialogues.en: Lord Corlys is said to have engaged in negotiations

dialogues.cn: 与布拉佛斯海王商谈婚事
dialogues.en: with the Sealord of Braavos.

dialogues.cn: 他打算把女儿兰娜尔嫁给海王之子
dialogues.en: He plans to wed his daughter Laena to the Sealord's son.

dialogues.cn: 如果瓦列利安家族与
dialogues.en: If House Velaryon entered into an alliance

dialogues.cn: 自由贸易城邦结盟
dialogues.en: with the Free Cities

dialogues.cn: 那么
dialogues.en: then...

dialogues.cn: 我们也应当善用我方资源缔结婚约
dialogues.en: we would have to seek our own marriage pact.

dialogues.cn: - 晚安 克里斯顿爵士 - 祝您好梦 公主
dialogues.en: -Good night, Ser Criston. -Sleep well, Princess.

dialogues.cn: 我们要去哪儿？
dialogues.en: Where are we going?

dialogues.cn: 滚开 小子
dialogues.en: Fuck off, boy.

dialogues.cn: 他管我叫“小子”
dialogues.en: He called me boy.

dialogues.cn: 你想知道自己的死法吗？孩子
dialogues.en: Do you wish to know your death, child?

dialogues.cn: 让我来吧
dialogues.en: Let me take that.

dialogues.cn: 全都退下
dialogues.en: Leave us, all of you.

dialogues.cn: 你的动作比她们轻柔多了
dialogues.en: You have a far kinder touch than they do.

dialogues.cn: 谢谢 我的夫君
dialogues.en: Thank you, husband.

dialogues.cn: 现在来说说伟大的铁王座
dialogues.en: And now we come to the matter of the great Iron Chair...

dialogues.cn: 以及谁的屁股会坐上去
dialogues.en: and whose bum it might bear.

dialogues.cn: 我们的好国王
dialogues.en: Our good King...

dialogues.cn: 选定了他的女儿
dialogues.en: names his daughter,

dialogues.cn: 一个女孩 作为继承人
dialogues.en: a girl, his heir.

dialogues.cn: 但后来 他又有了一个孩子
dialogues.en: But then to him, a babe is born.

dialogues.cn: 是个儿子！
dialogues.en: A son!

dialogues.cn: 谁会继承铁王座？
dialogues.en: To which heir might the chair bear?

dialogues.cn: 会是谁？
dialogues.en: Who will it be?

dialogues.cn: 是弟弟？还是女儿？
dialogues.en: The brother? The daughter?

dialogues.cn: 还是三岁的小王子？
dialogues.en: Or the little princeling of three?

dialogues.cn: 雷妮拉 王国之光
dialogues.en: Rhaenyra... the Realm's Delight,

dialogues.cn: 一个女孩 如此年轻 势单力薄
dialogues.en: a girl so young and so slight...

dialogues.cn: 她被所有臣民爱戴
dialogues.en: loved by all of her people,

dialogues.cn: 但她能成为强大的女王吗？
dialogues.en: but would she make a powerful queen,

dialogues.cn: - 还是弱不禁风？- 弱不禁风！
dialogues.en: -or would she be feeble? -Feeble!

dialogues.cn: 还有伊耿 小王子 没准他也盯着王位
dialogues.en: Though Aegon, the babe Prince, might long for a claim,

dialogues.cn: 他有两样东西 雷妮拉不能比
dialogues.en: he has two things Rhaenyra cannot:

dialogues.cn: 他有征服者的名字
dialogues.en: a conqueror's name...

dialogues.cn: 还带着把儿
dialogues.en: and a cock.

dialogues.cn: 谎言 诽谤！嘘！
dialogues.en: Lies, slander! Boo!

dialogues.cn: 就当是笑话吧
dialogues.en: Jest if you will,

dialogues.cn: 不过这些市井小民更愿意相信
dialogues.en: but many of the smallfolk are like to believe

dialogues.cn: 作为男性 伊耿应当成为继承人
dialogues.en: that, as a male, Aegon should be the heir.

dialogues.cn: 随便他们怎么想 不重要
dialogues.en: Their wants are of no consequence.

dialogues.cn: 如果你日后想要统治这群人 他们怎么想就很重要
dialogues.en: They're of great consequence if you expect to rule them one day.

dialogues.cn: 一个晚上就好 我想卸下继承人的重担
dialogues.en: For one night, I wish to be free of the burdens of my inheritance.

dialogues.cn: 四个铜板 臭老鼠
dialogues.en: Four coppers, street rat.

dialogues.cn: 在君临城 我们为自己的欢愉买单
dialogues.en: In King's Landing, we pay for our pleasures.

dialogues.cn: - 喂！- 站住！小子！
dialogues.en: -Hey! -Stop! Boy!

dialogues.cn: 你等着 我会抓到他
dialogues.en: Wait, I'll find him.

dialogues.cn: 你跑什么 在躲谁？
dialogues.en: And who might you be running from, now?

dialogues.cn: 哈尔温爵士
dialogues.en: Ser Harwin.

dialogues.cn: 公主
dialogues.en: Princess.

dialogues.cn: 请别
dialogues.en: Don't.

dialogues.cn: 注意点 小子
dialogues.en: You take care, boy.

dialogues.cn: 下次你可就没这么幸运了
dialogues.en: Next time, you might not be so lucky.

dialogues.cn: 挺开心的 对吧？
dialogues.en: Enjoyed that, did you?

dialogues.cn: 谁知道下次品尝自由的味道 要等到什么时候
dialogues.en: Who knows when I'll next taste freedom?

dialogues.cn: 进来
dialogues.en: Come.

dialogues.cn: 请您原谅 王后陛下
dialogues.en: Pardon me, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 国王陛下请您过去
dialogues.en: The King has requested your presence.

dialogues.cn: 现在很晚了
dialogues.en: The hour is quite late.

dialogues.cn: 是的 王后陛下
dialogues.en: Yes, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 这是什么地方
dialogues.en: What is this place?

dialogues.cn: 这是人们满足需求的地方
dialogues.en: It's where people come to take what they want.

dialogues.cn: 你看 性爱也是一种欢愉
dialogues.en: Fucking is a pleasure, you see.

dialogues.cn: 男女都一样
dialogues.en: For the woman as it is the man.

dialogues.cn: 婚姻是责任 没错
dialogues.en: A marriage is a duty... Yes.

dialogues.cn: 但婚姻并不会阻止我们追求快乐
dialogues.en: But that doesn't stop us from doing what we want.

dialogues.cn: 睡我们想睡的人
dialogues.en: From fucking who we want.

dialogues.cn: 戴蒙？
dialogues.en: Daemon?

dialogues.cn: 公主？
dialogues.en: Princess?

dialogues.cn: 公主 您 您受伤了吗？
dialogues.en: Princess, are you, are you hurt?

dialogues.cn: - 我该通知御林铁卫队长 - 别
dialogues.en: -I should alert the Lord Commander. -No.

dialogues.cn: 我的头盔
dialogues.en: My helmet.

dialogues.cn: 您闹够了吗？
dialogues.en: You finished?

dialogues.cn: 谢谢
dialogues.en: Thank you.

dialogues.cn: 请停下
dialogues.en: Stop.

dialogues.cn: 很抱歉在深夜打扰您 大人
dialogues.en: Apologies for the late hour, my Lord.

dialogues.cn: 什么事？
dialogues.en: What is it?

dialogues.cn: 白蛆托人给您带个话
dialogues.en: A messenger brings word from the White Worm.

dialogues.cn: 你把我当成犯人了吗？
dialogues.en: Am I your prisoner?

dialogues.cn: 就像你曾经对我那样？
dialogues.en: As I was once yours?

dialogues.cn: 你很幸运 我是你的保护者
dialogues.en: I'm your protector, lucky for you.

dialogues.cn: 喝了这个 可以解酒
dialogues.en: This will cut the fog.

dialogues.cn: 我不需要一个普通的妓女来保护我
dialogues.en: I don't need protection from a common whore.

dialogues.cn: 我并不普通
dialogues.en: I am not so common.

dialogues.cn: 好吧 一个并不普通的妓女
dialogues.en: A not-so-common whore then.

dialogues.cn: 我早已告别了那种生活
dialogues.en: I've left that life behind.

dialogues.cn: 皮肉交易能给予我的非常有限
dialogues.en: I learned that skin-trade could only take me so far in this life.

dialogues.cn: 你向来不安分
dialogues.en: You never were one to stay idle.

dialogues.cn: 我并不想历经磨难 但也只能咬牙忍受
dialogues.en: Hard lessons are not welcomed but suffered.

dialogues.cn: 出门时记得去付房钱
dialogues.en: You can pay for the room on your way out.

dialogues.cn: 进来
dialogues.en: Come.

dialogues.cn: 什么事？
dialogues.en: What is it?

dialogues.cn: 陛下 万分抱歉 一大早就打扰您
dialogues.en: I apologize for the early hour, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 我有
dialogues.en: I have...

dialogues.cn: 有些让人不安的消息
dialogues.en: discomforting news.

dialogues.cn: 我想 最好在御前会议召开前 先私下向您禀告
dialogues.en: I thought it best shared discreetly before the council convenes.

dialogues.cn: 是海蛇吗
dialogues.en: The Sea Snake.

dialogues.cn: 陛下 恐怕此事和公主有关
dialogues.en: I'm afraid it concerns the Princess, my King.

dialogues.cn: 她受到伤害了？
dialogues.en: Has she been harmed?

dialogues.cn: 把女儿的一些事情告知父亲
dialogues.en: It is no easy thing

dialogues.cn: 并非易事
dialogues.en: to tell a father of his daughter's exploits.

dialogues.cn: 我也想保持沉默 但是——
dialogues.en: I had considered saying nothing, but--

dialogues.cn: 她做了什么？
dialogues.en: What has she done?

dialogues.cn: 昨晚 有人见到公主
dialogues.en: The Princess was spied last evening...

dialogues.cn: 在红堡外的
dialogues.en: beyond the walls of the Keep...

dialogues.cn: 一所妓院里
dialogues.en: in a pleasure house.

dialogues.cn: 你说什么？
dialogues.en: What of it?

dialogues.cn: 她和她的叔叔搞在一起
dialogues.en: She was carrying on with her uncle.

dialogues.cn: 他们的所作所为 有损公主的
dialogues.en: They were engaged in behaviors unbecoming of a maiden...

dialogues.cn: 贞洁之名
dialogues.en: of a Princess.

dialogues.cn: 什么所作所为
dialogues.en: What behaviors?

dialogues.cn: 我必须明说吗 陛下
dialogues.en: Well, must I say it, Your Grace?

dialogues.cn: 你走进我的寝宫 指责我的女儿 又不把话说清
dialogues.en: You enter my bedchamber, accusing my daughter of something.

dialogues.cn: 你直接点吧
dialogues.en: Now speak it... plainly.

dialogues.cn: 有人看见戴蒙和雷妮拉在一起
dialogues.en: Daemon and Rhaenyra were seen together...

dialogues.cn: 在妓院深处
dialogues.en: in the bowels of a pleasure den.

dialogues.cn: 他睡了她
dialogues.en: Coupling.

dialogues.cn: 胡说八道
dialogues.en: This is a lie.

dialogues.cn: 你被骗了
dialogues.en: You have been lied to.

dialogues.cn: 我也希望是这样 陛下
dialogues.en: I only wish that were true, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 是谁在传播谣言？
dialogues.en: Who is responsible for this gossip?

dialogues.cn: 立刻把这个造谣的带来见我
dialogues.en: Have this rumormonger brought before me at once.

dialogues.cn: 我要挖掉他的眼睛
dialogues.en: And I will take their eyes.

dialogues.cn: 作为首相 收集可靠情报是我职责所在
dialogues.en: As your Hand, I must maintain trusted sources of information.

dialogues.cn: 这次的眼线非常可靠 至今从未失手
dialogues.en: And this one, as yet, has never led me astray.

dialogues.cn: 并且 好几个仆人已经承认
dialogues.en: And several of the servants have now admitted to seeing her,

dialogues.cn: 见到公主……
dialogues.en: the Princess...

dialogues.cn: 在猫头鹰时
dialogues.en: creeping through the gates from King's Landing,

dialogues.cn: 乔装成侍从
dialogues.en: disguised as a page

dialogues.cn: 偷偷溜过君临城门
dialogues.en: during the hour of the owl.

dialogues.cn: 你被野心冲昏了头脑是吧
dialogues.en: Are you so sick with ambition

dialogues.cn: 居然派人跟踪我女儿？
dialogues.en: that you would have my daughter stalked?

dialogues.cn: 秘密监视她？
dialogues.en: Spied upon?

dialogues.cn: 就等着绝佳机会 好毁掉她的名誉是吧？
dialogues.en: Awaiting your best chance to destroy her reputation?

dialogues.cn: 我绝无此意 陛下
dialogues.en: I have no such intent, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 你自以为很聪明
dialogues.en: You think yourself a cunning man.

dialogues.cn: 你那些心思也太明显了吧
dialogues.en: Your designs are obvious.

dialogues.cn: 你就那么想把你的血脉推上铁王座
dialogues.en: Do you wish to have your blood on the Iron Throne so badly

dialogues.cn: 甚至不惜毁掉我的血脉？
dialogues.en: that you are willing to destroy mine own?

dialogues.cn: 出去
dialogues.en: Just get out.

dialogues.cn: 立刻给我出去
dialogues.en: Leave me... at once.

dialogues.cn: 陛下 告退
dialogues.en: Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 我穿好衣服了 阿诺拉 进来吧
dialogues.en: I'm dressed, Annora. Come.

dialogues.cn: 公主
dialogues.en: Princess.

dialogues.cn: 过来
dialogues.en: Come.

dialogues.cn: 公主 王后让我过来传个话
dialogues.en: Princess, I have a message from the Queen.

dialogues.cn: 昨晚发生了什么？
dialogues.en: What happened last night?

dialogues.cn: 什么意思？
dialogues.en: What do you mean?

dialogues.cn: 我父亲对你提出了一些令人担忧的指控
dialogues.en: My father has made some worrying allegations about you.

dialogues.cn: 你当时是和你叔叔在一起吗？
dialogues.en: Were you with your uncle?

dialogues.cn: 哦 我……
dialogues.en: Oh, I...

dialogues.cn: 我好几年没见过他了
dialogues.en: I haven't seen him in years.

dialogues.cn: 他带我到城里去放松一下
dialogues.en: He took me into the city for some fun.

dialogues.cn: 全都告诉我 雷妮拉
dialogues.en: Tell me the whole of it, Rhaenyra.

dialogues.cn: 你父亲指控我做了什么
dialogues.en: Your father accused me of something.

dialogues.cn: 喝酒吗？
dialogues.en: That I drank wine?

dialogues.cn: 还是天黑以后离开城堡？
dialogues.en: Left the castle after dark?

dialogues.cn: 你在妓院睡了戴蒙
dialogues.en: That you fucked Daemon in a pleasure house.

dialogues.cn: 这真是个卑鄙的指控
dialogues.en: This is a vile accusation.

dialogues.cn: 是吗？
dialogues.en: Is it?

dialogues.cn: 你们坦格利安确实有一些奇怪的传统
dialogues.en: You Targaryens do have queer customs.

dialogues.cn: - 而且戴蒙显然毫无底线 - 阿莉森
dialogues.en: -And Daemon certainly knows no limit. -Alicent...

dialogues.cn: 王后陛下 姐姐 你一定要相信我
dialogues.en: Your Grace, sister, you must know I would,

dialogues.cn: 我绝不会
dialogues.en: I would never.

dialogues.cn: 你不能这样轻信谣言
dialogues.en: You cannot believe such gossip.

dialogues.cn: 我父亲所说不是谣言
dialogues.en: My father is no gossip.

dialogues.cn: 很显然他被误导了
dialogues.en: Well, certainly he's been misled.

dialogues.cn: 这种事他不可能亲眼目睹
dialogues.en: He could not have witnessed such a thing.

dialogues.cn: - 为什么？ - 因为这事纯属捏造
dialogues.en: -Why not? -Because it did not happen.

dialogues.cn: - 有人告诉他——  - 有人？
dialogues.en: -He was told that you-- -Told?

dialogues.cn: 谁对你父亲说的这些？
dialogues.en: Who made these claims to your father?

dialogues.cn: 我是公主
dialogues.en: I am the Princess.

dialogues.cn: 质疑我的品德就是叛国行为
dialogues.en: To question my virtue is an act of treason.

dialogues.cn: - 我并不知道具体—— - 你父亲没有告诉你吗？
dialogues.en: -I do not know specifically-- -Your father did not tell you?

dialogues.cn: 他向国王报告此事
dialogues.en: He reported it to the King.

dialogues.cn: 我听到了
dialogues.en: I overheard.

dialogues.cn: 所以你用无意听到的诽谤……
dialogues.en: So you are accusing me of slanders...

dialogues.cn: 来指责我？
dialogues.en: you overheard?

dialogues.cn: 我只想帮助你 雷妮拉
dialogues.en: I only want to help you, Rhaenyra.

dialogues.cn: 我们去了一家酒馆喝酒
dialogues.en: We drank in a tavern.

dialogues.cn: 几家……酒馆
dialogues.en: Several... taverns.

dialogues.cn: 后来太晚了……
dialogues.en: It was getting late...

dialogues.cn: 我要回家
dialogues.en: and I asked to go home.

dialogues.cn: 但戴蒙还想继续
dialogues.en: But Daemon wished to continue.

dialogues.cn: 我是跟着他出去的 决定权不在我
dialogues.en: As he was my escort, I had no real choice.
"Continue"...

dialogues.cn: 在妓院吗？
dialogues.en: in a brothel?

dialogues.cn: 他带我去看了一场表演
dialogues.en: He took me to a show.

dialogues.cn: 我只是观看 什么都没做
dialogues.en: I was only a spectator. I didn't do anything.

dialogues.cn: 然后戴蒙喝得烂醉
dialogues.en: And then Daemon sank into his cups and

dialogues.cn: 就丢下我去找妓女了
dialogues.en: abandoned me for some whore.

dialogues.cn: 我早该知道的
dialogues.en: I should've known better.

dialogues.cn: 所以你并没有？
dialogues.en: So you did not?

dialogues.cn: 真的需要我正式否认吗？
dialogues.en: Must I truly refute that?

dialogues.cn: 戴蒙没有碰过我
dialogues.en: Daemon never touched me.

dialogues.cn: 我以我母亲的名义发誓
dialogues.en: I swear this to you upon the memory of my mother.

dialogues.cn: 把自己置于这样清白会受到质疑的境地
dialogues.en: It was foolish of you to place yourself in a position

dialogues.cn: 你真是太蠢了
dialogues.en: where your virtue could even come into question.

dialogues.cn: 陛下竭尽全力为你寻找良配
dialogues.en: The King has strived to find you a good match.

dialogues.cn: 我也一样
dialogues.en: And so have I.

dialogues.cn: 如果那位大人认为你被……
dialogues.en: If that lord were to think that you had been...

dialogues.cn: 玷污了……
dialogues.en: sullied...

dialogues.cn: - 那一切都毁了 - 我知道……
dialogues.en: -it would ruin everything. -I know...

dialogues.cn: 陛下
dialogues.en: Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 我很后悔
dialogues.en: I regret it.

dialogues.cn: 国王命你觐见 王子殿下
dialogues.en: The King demands an audience, my Prince.

dialogues.cn: 把你的脏手拿开
dialogues.en: Take your fucking hands off me.

dialogues.cn: 我女儿
dialogues.en: My daughter.

dialogues.cn: 你都不否认一下吗？
dialogues.en: Won't you even deny it?

dialogues.cn: 我得先知道罪名 才能知道要否认什么
dialogues.en: I need to understand the charge before I can attempt to discredit it.

dialogues.cn: 你玷污了她
dialogues.en: You defiled her.

dialogues.cn: 你还是什么都不说
dialogues.en: Still, you say nothing.

dialogues.cn: 有什么关系呢 哥哥？
dialogues.en: What does it matter, brother?

dialogues.cn: 我们在雷妮拉这个年龄的时候
dialogues.en: When we were Rhaenyra's age,

dialogues.cn: 可是把丝绸街的那些妓院
dialogues.en: we fucked our way through most of the brothels

dialogues.cn: 一路干了个遍
dialogues.en: on the Street of Silk.

dialogues.cn: 我们是年轻男人
dialogues.en: We were young men.

dialogues.cn: 而她只是个小女孩
dialogues.en: She is just a girl.

dialogues.cn: - 你的侄女！ - 雷妮拉是个成年女子了
dialogues.en: -Your niece! -Rhaenyra's a woman-grown.

dialogues.cn: 比起我们是跟几个婊子 她的第一次跟我还不错吧
dialogues.en: Better her first experience be with me than some whore.

dialogues.cn: 你他妈的——
dialogues.en: You fucking--

dialogues.cn: 你毁了她！
dialogues.en: You have ruined her!

dialogues.cn: 到了这个地步  哪位大人还会娶她？
dialogues.en: What lord will wed her now? In this condition?

dialogues.cn: 谁他妈在意什么大人怎么想？
dialogues.en: Who gives a fuck what some lord thinks?

dialogues.cn: 你是真龙 你的话就是金科玉律
dialogues.en: You are the dragon. Your word is truth and law.

dialogues.cn: 我一辈子都在维护你
dialogues.en: I have spent a lifetime defending you.

dialogues.cn: 但你的心比我想的还要黑
dialogues.en: But your heart is even blacker than I thought.

dialogues.cn: 我应该废掉她的继承权 就像当初对你一样 一了百了
dialogues.en: I should disinherit her as I already did you and be done with it.

dialogues.cn: 把她嫁给我
dialogues.en: Wed her to me.

dialogues.cn: 当我献上王冠时 你说我要什么都可以的
dialogues.en: When I offered up my crown, you said I could have anything.

dialogues.cn: 我要雷妮拉 我会接受这样的她
dialogues.en: I want Rhaenyra. I'll take her as she is,

dialogues.cn: 按我们的家族传统娶了她
dialogues.en: and wed her in the tradition of our house.

dialogues.cn: 你已经结婚了
dialogues.en: You are already wed.

dialogues.cn: 征服者伊耿也娶了第二位妻子啊
dialogues.en: That didn't stop Aegon the Conqueror from taking a second wife.

dialogues.cn: 你不是征服者
dialogues.en: You are no conqueror.

dialogues.cn: 你就是……我命中灾星
dialogues.en: You are a plague... sent to destroy me.

dialogues.cn: 让我娶雷妮拉为妻
dialogues.en: Give me Rhaenyra to take to wife

dialogues.cn: 我们会让龙王家族恢复往日荣光
dialogues.en: and we will return the House of the Dragon to its proper glory.

dialogues.cn: 当然了
dialogues.en: Of course.

dialogues.cn: 你觊觎的并非我的女儿 是吗？
dialogues.en: It's not my daughter you lust for, is it?

dialogues.cn: 而是我的王位
dialogues.en: It's my throne.

dialogues.cn: 回谷地去 戴蒙
dialogues.en: Go back to the Vale, Daemon,

dialogues.cn: 到你的合法妻子身边去
dialogues.en: to your lawful wife.

dialogues.cn: 努力去重建你身上残存的荣誉吧
dialogues.en: Strive to restore whatever scrap of honor remains in you.

dialogues.cn: 不去也行 我不在乎
dialogues.en: Or don't. Matters not to me.

dialogues.cn: 只要永远别让我再看见你
dialogues.en: As long as you are gone from my sight for good.

dialogues.cn: 如你所愿 哥哥
dialogues.en: As you wish, brother.

dialogues.cn: 和她谈过了吗
dialogues.en: Have you spoken to her?

dialogues.cn: 没有
dialogues.en: No.

dialogues.cn: 雷妮拉天性耿直 她不会撒谎
dialogues.en: It is not in Rhaenyra's nature to be deceitful.

dialogues.cn: 您的弟弟却未必如此
dialogues.en: I cannot say the same for your brother.

dialogues.cn: 你认为他撒谎了？
dialogues.en: You believe he lied?

dialogues.cn: 他说过几句纯粹的真话？
dialogues.en: How often does he speak the pure truth?

dialogues.cn: 承认这种事情 对他有什么好处？
dialogues.en: How does confessing to such things serve him?

dialogues.cn: 可以削弱您的权威
dialogues.en: By reducing you.

dialogues.cn: 无论发生了什么 雷妮拉也不清白
dialogues.en: Whatever transpired, Rhaenyra is not innocent.

dialogues.cn: 那是因为戴蒙引诱她堕落
dialogues.en: Only because Daemon tried to corrupt her.

dialogues.cn: 戴蒙和雷妮拉都流着真龙之血
dialogues.en: Daemon and Rhaenyra share the blood of the dragon.

dialogues.cn: 他们反复无常 从不安分
dialogues.en: They are restless and chaotic.

dialogues.cn: 她向我发誓她仍是处子之身
dialogues.en: She swore to me that she remains a maiden.

dialogues.cn: 我相信她
dialogues.en: And I believe her.

dialogues.cn: 这把匕首 曾为征服者伊耿所有
dialogues.en: That dagger once belonged to Aegon the Conqueror.

dialogues.cn: 往上可以追溯到伊纳尔
dialogues.en: It was Aenar's before that.

dialogues.cn: 再往前……
dialogues.en: And before that...

dialogues.cn: 就说不清了
dialogues.en: It is difficult to know.

dialogues.cn: 伊耿去世前 瓦雷利亚最后的火术士
dialogues.en: Before Aegon's death, the last of the Valyrian pyromancers

dialogues.cn: 将他的歌藏在刀刃上
dialogues.en: hid his song in the steel.

dialogues.cn: “我的血脉中……”
dialogues.en: "From my blood...

dialogues.cn: “将诞生预言中的王子……“
dialogues.en: "come the Prince That Was Promised...

dialogues.cn: “他的血便是冰与火之歌”
dialogues.en: and his will be the Song of Ice and Fire."

dialogues.cn: 我交付给你的责任
dialogues.en: The responsibility I have handed to you,

dialogues.cn: 知晓此事的负担
dialogues.en: the burden of this knowledge...

dialogues.cn: 远比王位和国王更重要
dialogues.en: it is larger than the throne, the king.

dialogues.cn: 远比你和你的欲望
dialogues.en: It is larger than you

dialogues.cn: 更重要
dialogues.en: and your desires.

dialogues.cn: 如果是杰赫里斯 他会剥夺你的继承权
dialogues.en: Jaehaerys would've disinherited you.

dialogues.cn: 就因为一个谎言？
dialogues.en: For a lie?

dialogues.cn: 你甚至都没问我 真相到底是什么
dialogues.en: You've yet to ask me for the truth of what happened.

dialogues.cn: 真相不重要 雷妮拉
dialogues.en: The truth does not matter, Rhaenyra.

dialogues.cn: 世人的看法才重要
dialogues.en: Only perception.

dialogues.cn: 你将自己置于危险境地
dialogues.en: You have exposed yourself.

dialogues.cn: 如今我们都得承担后果
dialogues.en: Now we must both suffer the consequences.

dialogues.cn: 假如生为男子 那我想睡谁就能睡谁
dialogues.en: Were I born a man, I could bed whomever I wanted.

dialogues.cn: 我可以生一打私生子女
dialogues.en: I could father a dozen bastards,

dialogues.cn: 你朝堂上那些人连眼睛都不会眨一下
dialogues.en: and no one in your court would blink an eye.

dialogues.cn: 你说的没错……但谁让你生为女子
dialogues.en: You are right... but you were born a woman.

dialogues.cn: 所以你就要剥夺我的头衔 转而立伊耿为嗣
dialogues.en: So you'll strip me of my titles and name Aegon in my stead.

dialogues.cn: 我也想这样
dialogues.en: I would.

dialogues.cn: 但我的职责 是将王国团结一心 而不是制造更多分裂
dialogues.en: But it is mine to hold the realm together, not sow it with further division.

dialogues.cn: 你选择夫婿的自由到此为止
dialogues.en: Your courtship is at an end.

dialogues.cn: 接下来 你将会嫁给兰尼诺·瓦列利安爵士
dialogues.en: You will wed Ser Laenor Velaryon,

dialogues.cn: 不得有违
dialogues.en: and you will do so without protest.

dialogues.cn: 海蛇之子
dialogues.en: The son of the Sea Snake.

dialogues.cn: 就这样拿我来治你的政治顽疾
dialogues.en: So I can be a remedy for your political headaches.

dialogues.cn: 你就是我的政治顽疾！
dialogues.en: You are my political headache!

dialogues.cn: 你嫁给兰尼诺·瓦列利安
dialogues.en: Your wedding to Ser Laenor Velaryon

dialogues.cn: 会将王国最有权势的两大家族团结起来
dialogues.en: will unite the two most powerful houses in the realm.

dialogues.cn: 一旦我们的巨龙与舰队联合起来
dialogues.en: With the combined strength of our shared dragons and naval fleets,

dialogues.cn: 那就无人胆敢发起挑战
dialogues.en: no one would dare to stand against us.

dialogues.cn: 龙王家族
dialogues.en: The House of the Dragon

dialogues.cn: 将团结一心 延绵至下个世代
dialogues.en: will stand as one for a further generation.

dialogues.cn: 那你会怎么处置停在王座上的秃鹫？
dialogues.en: And what will you do about the vulture who perches upon your throne?

dialogues.cn: 什么秃鹫？
dialogues.en: What vulture?

dialogues.cn: 你的首相
dialogues.en: Your Hand.

dialogues.cn: 奥托·海塔尔忠心耿耿地侍奉了两代国王
dialogues.en: Otto Hightower has served two kings loyally and faithfully.

dialogues.cn: 他想让伊耿当王储
dialogues.en: He wants Aegon to be named heir.

dialogues.cn: 不达目的 他不会罢休
dialogues.en: And he will stop at nothing to see it done.

dialogues.cn: 比如 为了毁掉我而监视我
dialogues.en: Including spying on me to bring about my ruin.

dialogues.cn: 你口口声声说着征服者的预言
dialogues.en: You speak of The Conqueror's vision

dialogues.cn: 说着需要力量 说着团结王国
dialogues.en: and the need for strength and unity across the realm.

dialogues.cn: 但如果你最信任的谋臣一心只为个人私利
dialogues.en: But how can that be accomplished

dialogues.cn: 你又怎能实现这一切？
dialogues.en: with your most trusted adviser so self-interested?

dialogues.cn: 外面请求觐见的每位领主和贵妇
dialogues.en: Every lord and lady that calls for an audience with me,

dialogues.cn: 我的御前重臣 乃至历代所有御前重臣
dialogues.en: every man on my small council,

dialogues.cn: 人人自利 谁能例外
dialogues.en: and all councils past, has been self-interested.

dialogues.cn: - 这是人的天性 - 我不同意
dialogues.en: - It is unavoidable. - I disagree.

dialogues.cn: 我会履行王储的职责 嫁给兰尼诺爵士
dialogues.en: I will do my duty as heir and wed Ser Laenor.

dialogues.cn: 但首先 你要履行国王的职责
dialogues.en: But you must first do yours as king.

dialogues.cn: 陛下
dialogues.en: Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 五天
dialogues.en: Five days.

dialogues.cn: 抱歉 陛下？
dialogues.en: I'm sorry, Your Grace?

dialogues.cn: 那是很多年前了
dialogues.en: Though it was some time ago.

dialogues.cn: 很多细节……已然消失在记忆中
dialogues.en: The details... they fade in memory.

dialogues.cn: 我的父亲曾是一位健壮的战士和驭龙者
dialogues.en: My father was a hale and healthy warrior and dragonrider

dialogues.cn: 当时他正值壮年
dialogues.en: at the peak of his abilities.

dialogues.cn: 杰赫里斯举办了盛大的王家围猎
dialogues.en: Jaehaerys named a great royal hunt

dialogues.cn: 来庆祝他担任首相
dialogues.en: to celebrate him being named the Hand of the King.

dialogues.cn: 五天之后 我的父亲死了
dialogues.en: Five days later my father lay dead.

dialogues.cn: 就连比武大会都还没开完
dialogues.en: Tourneys last longer.

dialogues.cn: “勇敢的”贝尔隆
dialogues.en: Baelon the Brave,

dialogues.cn: 瓦格哈尔的骑士
dialogues.en: rider of Vhagar,

dialogues.cn: 铁王座的继承人……
dialogues.en: heir to the Iron Throne...

dialogues.cn: 死于肚腹破裂
dialogues.en: dead of a burst belly.

dialogues.cn: 诸神自有黑色的智慧
dialogues.en: The gods have a dark wit.

dialogues.cn: 那是残酷的一天
dialogues.en: It was a grim day.

dialogues.cn: - 我记得非常清晰 - 是啊……
dialogues.en: - I recall it all too well. - Yeah...

dialogues.cn: 对你来说 那可是个好日子
dialogues.en: It was a good day for you.

dialogues.cn: 杰赫里斯让你接替贝尔隆做了首相
dialogues.en: Jaehaerys named you Hand in Baelon's stead.

dialogues.cn: 我从没这么想过 陛下
dialogues.en: That's hardly how I viewed it, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 这是责任
dialogues.en: It was a duty.

dialogues.cn: 是你侍奉我的祖父度过了最后的时日
dialogues.en: You served my grandsire nobly in his final days.

dialogues.cn: 是你教我怎么成为国王
dialogues.en: You are the man that taught me how to be King.

dialogues.cn: 陛下过誉
dialogues.en: You honor me, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 仅仅五天……
dialogues.en: Just five days...

dialogues.cn: 你就从杰赫里斯朝中的无名之辈
dialogues.en: you went from being another man in Jaehaerys's court,

dialogues.cn: 一跃成为整个王国的二号人物
dialogues.en: to the second most powerful man in the realm.

dialogues.cn: 我在想……
dialogues.en: I wonder...

dialogues.cn: 选择将个人利益置于国王之上 又费得了你多少时间呢？
dialogues.en: how long did it take you to choose yourself over your King?

dialogues.cn: 陛下？
dialogues.en: Your Grace?

dialogues.cn: 爱玛之死是我永远无法治愈的伤痛
dialogues.en: I will never recover from Aemma's death.

dialogues.cn: 而阿莉森……
dialogues.en: But Alicent...

dialogues.cn: 她陪我度过了最悲伤的时候
dialogues.en: she took me through the worst of my grief.

dialogues.cn: 但她的陪伴只是一场精心算计
dialogues.en: She was a calculated distraction.

dialogues.cn: 我现在才意识到 你算得太精妙了
dialogues.en: I only now realize how well-calculated it was.

dialogues.cn: 太荒谬了
dialogues.en: That is an absurdity.

dialogues.cn: 王后爱您……
dialogues.en: The Queen loves you...

dialogues.cn: 正如您也爱她
dialogues.en: as I know you love her.

dialogues.cn: 你的利益不再与王国一致
dialogues.en: Your interests no longer align with those of the realm.

dialogues.cn: 你的判断受了太多干扰
dialogues.en: Your judgment has been compromised.

dialogues.cn: 一位忠诚的首相
dialogues.en: A loyal Hand must tell his king

dialogues.cn: 必然时时忠言逆耳 陛下
dialogues.en: a discomforting truth from time to time, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 如果没有做到……
dialogues.en: If he doesn't...

dialogues.cn: 就是他的失职
dialogues.en: he's failed as a servant.

dialogues.cn: 你是一位忠实的仆从 奥托
dialogues.en: You were a faithful servant, Otto.

dialogues.cn: 你为国王与王国奉献良多
dialogues.en: The crown and the realm

dialogues.cn: 我将永远铭记
dialogues.en: both owe you a debt that can never be repaid.

dialogues.cn: 但我无法再信任你的判断
dialogues.en: But I can no longer trust your judgment.

dialogues.cn: 进来
dialogues.en: Come.

dialogues.cn: 深夜打扰 请您原谅 公主殿下
dialogues.en: I hope you can forgive the late hour, Princess.

dialogues.cn: 这是我精心准备的
dialogues.en: I took great care in its preparation.

dialogues.cn: 如果调制不当 要么失灵
dialogues.en: If not brewed properly, it can either prove ineffective

dialogues.cn: - 要么会有不良反应……  - 调制不当？
dialogues.en: - or else bear unpleasant-- - Brewed properly?

dialogues.cn: 等等 这是什么？
dialogues.en: I'm sorry, what is that?

dialogues.cn: 一种茶 公主殿下
dialogues.en: A tea, Princess.

dialogues.cn: 是国王给您的
dialogues.en: From the King.

dialogues.cn: 它会让您避免任何意外的后果
dialogues.en: It will rid you of any unwanted consequences.

dialogues.cn: 瓦雷利亚末日
坦格利安家族征服维斯特洛
科利斯·瓦列利安

第一季 第四集
狭海之王 King of the Narrow Sea

dialogues.cn: 莱昂诺·斯壮
dialogues.en: 法务大臣

dialogues.cn: 哈尔温·斯壮
dialogues.en: “碎骨人” 莱昂诺的长子

dialogues.cn: 布雷肯家族与布莱伍德家族自安达尔人入侵前便为世仇，
dialogues.en: 布雷肯家族在安达尔人入侵后改信七神，而布莱伍德家族有着坚定的旧神信仰。

dialogues.cn: 此剑为“黑火”，是坦格利安家族祖传宝剑之一，
dialogues.en: 曾为“征服者”伊耿的佩剑。有人认为这把剑象征着王权。

dialogues.cn: 月茶，一种用来避孕及堕胎的草药茶。
“流亡者”伊纳尔·坦格利安，是坦格利安王室的祖先，
dialogues.en: 曾在末日浩劫降临瓦雷利亚之前率领整个家族迁至龙石岛。

dialogues.cn: 穿上这个
dialogues.en: Kesommi aōle mīsās.  推开挂毯后面的墙 Rhakiāzmo inkot dōros indīs. 沿着通道走 Geltilio rȳ jās. 我在外面等你 Ninkiot avy rhaeninna.

dialogues.cn: 你看上去在龙石岛过得很满足
dialogues.en: Hae hunē kirine Zaldrīzdōrot īlō vestretas.

dialogues.cn: 为什么要回来呢？
dialogues.en: Skoro syt āmastā?

dialogues.cn: 你回来肯定不只是为了戏弄我父亲
dialogues.en: Sīlāvose umbun aōho āmāzinot kepe ñuhe mīvindigon toliot ilzi.

dialogues.cn: 婚姻不过是一场政治上的安排
dialogues.en: Idīnnon dēmalio syt verdilla mērī issa.

dialogues.cn: 结了婚以后 你可以想干什么就干什么
dialogues.en: Dīnakson toliot, gaoso gaomagon kostas.

dialogues.cn: 对男人来说 婚姻或许是政治上的安排
dialogues.en: Valo syt, idīnnon dēmalio syt verdilla sagon kostus.

dialogues.cn: 对女人 婚姻就像宣判死刑
dialogues.en: Ābro syt, vējītsos.

dialogues.cn: 如果是这样的话 我早就摆脱我那个青铜婊子了
dialogues.en: Hegnīr iksos jaelan. Nyke hen ñuho Brāedāzmo Bratsiot ēlio ono gō dāerēdoks.

dialogues.cn: 你的妻子很幸运
dialogues.en: Ābrazȳrys aōhys biare istas;

dialogues.cn: 你没有让她怀孕
dialogues.en: ziry lēdetō daor.

dialogues.cn: 我都怀疑 那么恶劣的环境里 孩子能不能长大
dialogues.en: Keso qrinuntenko tolālȳti ūbriljagon rūs nājumban.

dialogues.cn: 我的母亲被逼诞下子嗣 直到这件事最后害死了她
dialogues.en: Muña ñuha dārannī āpykagon isētaks vapār ziry morghākotas.

dialogues.cn: 我不会让自己也遭受同样的命运
dialogues.en: Hēnkos vējose botilun daor.

dialogues.cn: 发生在你母亲身上的事是一场悲剧
dialogues.en: Aōhe muñe imassitas līr mundāzma istas,

dialogues.cn: 但这世界本就充满悲剧
dialogues.en: yn kesy mundāzmo vȳs issa.

dialogues.cn: 你不能一生都活在恐惧中 那样你会错过人生最精彩的部分
dialogues.en: Glaeson aōhon zūgose glaesagon kostō daor, iā jāhī albijossa āzālilē.

dialogues.cn: 我不想活在恐惧中
dialogues.en: Zūgose glaesilun jaelon daor.

dialogues.cn: 只想独自生活
dialogues.en: Mērpāvose glaesilun.
